faqs.question: What are the most common pantry pests in Gerritsen Beach homes?
faqs.answer: Gerritsen Beach homeowners most frequently encounter Indian meal moths, flour beetles, cigarette beetles, and grain weevils. These pests infest dry goods like cereals, flour, pasta, dried fruits, and pet food. The coastal humidity in Gerritsen Beach can accelerate infestations if not addressed promptly.
